name: Loadsmart
what_it_does: Digital freight brokerage API for instant truckload (FTL), LTL, and intermodal rate quotes, booking, and shipment tracking with AI-powered pricing.
use_cases: Instant FTL and LTL rate quotes for domestic US freight
Automated freight booking without manual broker interaction
Shipment tracking from pickup to delivery
Freight spend optimization across modes (truck vs intermodal)
Carrier capacity access for surge shipping periods
not_for: Non-US domestic shipping (limited coverage outside North America)
best_when: An agent needs to automate domestic US truckload or LTL procurement with instant pricing and booking, avoiding manual freight broker interactions.
avoid_when: You need international freight or parcel shipping, or require granular tracking at the pallet/item level.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow for API access. Limited scope granularity — access is largely all-or-nothing per credential set. Sandbox environment available with separate credentials.

pricing.notes: API access is commercial — costs tied to freight booked. No standalone API subscription fee. Requires business account setup.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Functional error responses but limited detail on freight-specific failure modes (lane not serviced, capacity unavailable, commodity restrictions). Error codes not well documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency key support. Agents must track booking state independently to avoid duplicate loads.
known_agent_gotchas: Instant rates only available on lanes with high data density — sparse lanes return 'contact broker' instead of a price
Rate quotes are time-sensitive; price can change between quote and booking
Pickup and delivery locations require structured address format — free-text not reliably geocoded
Commodity description affects pricing; vague descriptions may inflate rates
Booking confirmation is asynchronous — agents must poll or handle webhook for carrier assignment
Intermodal pricing requires longer lead times; instant pricing may not be available under 5 days

security_score_components.security_notes: OAuth2 is solid but scope granularity is weak. SOC2 certified. Sandbox uses separate credentials which is good practice. No documented key rotation or expiry policy.
